subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that in this luminous dawn the vernal showers of divine mercy have, by the leave of the Lord Almighty, renewed the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد در این فجر نورانی امطار رحمت نیسانی باذن حضرت باری عالم را تجدید
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
